name: Kindergarten Maker & 3D Design — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for models, testing, redesign, and explaining a creation. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with models, testing, redesign, and explaining a creation.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about models, testing, redesign, and explaining a creation through a close look at models, testing, redesign, and explaining a creation.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about models, testing, redesign, and explaining a creation through a guided practice with models, testing, redesign, and explaining a creation.

lessons.title: Make or show: models, testing, redesign, and explaining a creation
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about models, testing, redesign, and explaining a creation through a small creation or demonstration about models, testing, redesign, and explaining a creation.

I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

activities.title: A close look at models, testing, redesign, and explaining a creation
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at models, testing, redesign, and explaining a creation, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in models, testing, redesign, and explaining a creation.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
